title: Dumber Mini
excerpt: A Nokia-style phone with WhatsApp and Maps!
content_html:
A Nokia-style phone with WhatsApp and Maps

Replace your smartphone with a minimalist device — while still keeping essential apps like WhatsApp, 2FA, banking, and public transit services.

Preorder now

  • Access necessary apps

    WhatsApp, Messenger, Spotify, Google Maps, Waze, Uber, Banking, Mass Transit, Digital ID.

  • Stop consuming content

    The small screen discourages watching Youtube and scrolling social media. Use our App Blocker for additional restrictions.

We want to give you a device that will get you through the day, without pulling you into endless scrolling.

  • Full support for WhatsApp, Messenger
  • App Store
  • NFC payments
  • Offline maps (Google Maps also available)
  • Built-in App Blocker
  • Front and rear Camera
  • Keypad and touchscreen controls
  • Ongoing security and bug-fix updates
  • Fully open source

Preorder now

News

  • DumberOS July update is out

    July 8, 2026

    The latest DumberOS update has just been rolled out! Your phone should notify you about it, and you can also update manually in Settings->System->Updates. Improved app compatibility (key attestation). Security...

    July 7, 2026

    Hello DumberOS fans, The pallet with 1000 of our phones arrived in our UK warehouse on July 1st. We were hoping to start shipping immediately, but it took a few...

    Dumber Mini shipping update

    July 7, 2026

    Hello DumberOS fans, The pallet with 1000 of our phones arrived in our UK warehouse on July 1st. We were hoping to start shipping immediately, but it took a few...

sentences.zh: 我们希望立即开始发货，但花了一些时间......

content_html_zh:
带有 WhatsApp 和地图功能的诺基亚风格手机

用极简设备取代您的智能手机，同时仍保留 WhatsApp、2FA、银行和公共交通服务等基本应用程序。

立即预订

  • 访问必要的应用程序WhatsApp、Messenger、Spotify、Google 地图、Waze、Uber、银行、公共交通、数字 ID。
  • 停止消费内容小屏幕不鼓励观看 YouTube 和滚动社交媒体。 使用我们的应用程序拦截器以获得额外的限制。

我们希望为您提供一款可以陪伴您度过这一天的设备，而不会让您无休止地滚动。

  • 全面支持 WhatsApp、Messenger
  • 应用商店
  • NFC支付
  • 离线地图（也可使用 Google 地图）
  • 内置应用程序拦截器
  • 前置和后置摄像头
  • 键盘和触摸屏控制
  • 持续的安全和错误修复更新
  • 完全开源

立即预订
